heading: Fines and penalties under contracts
label: 3933 Fines and penalties under contracts
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 523 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 203 of , art. II, , related to stay or vacation of execution of judgments and attachments, prior to the general amendment of this Act by . See .act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 88854 Stat. 1181Pub. L. 108–189section 3934 of this title
Effective DateSection applicable to any case not final before , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 19, 2003section 3 of Pub. L. 108–189section 3901 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 203 of , art. II, , related to stay or vacation of execution of judgments and attachments, prior to the general amendment of this Act by . See .act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 88854 Stat. 1181Pub. L. 108–189section 3934 of this title

children.heading: Prohibition of penalties
children.label: a Prohibition of penalties
children.text: When an action for compliance with the terms of a contract is stayed pursuant to this chapter, a penalty shall not accrue for failure to comply with the terms of the contract during the period of the stay.

children.heading: Reduction or waiver of fines or penalties
children.label: b Reduction or waiver of fines or penalties

children.text: the servicemember was in military service at the time the fine or penalty was incurred; and
the ability of the servicemember to perform the obligation was materially affected by such military service.
